recommendations.title: Clock
recommendations.overview: On the eve of her 38th birthday, a woman desperately attempts to fix her broken biological clock.

recommendations.title: Child's Play
recommendations.overview: Karen, a single mother, gifts her son Andy a Buddi doll for his birthday, unaware of its more sinister nature. A contemporary re-imagining of the 1988 horror classic.

recommendations.title: The Mouse Trap
recommendations.overview: It's Alex's 21st Birthday, but she's stuck at the amusement arcade on a late shift so her friends decide to surprise her, but a masked killer dressed as Mickey Mouse decides to play a game of his own with them which she must survive.

recommendations.title: Stitches
recommendations.overview: The clumsy and unfunny clown Richard "Stitches" Grindle entertains at the 10th birthday party of little Tom, but the boy and his friends play a prank with Stitches, tying his shoelaces. Stitches slips, falls and dies. Six years later, Tom gives a bir

recommendations.title: GirlHouse
recommendations.overview: In an attempt to make some extra cash while away at College, Kylie moves into a house that streams content to an X-rated website. After a deranged fan hacks in to determine the house's location, she finds herself in a terrifying fight for her life.

recommendations.title: The Conspiracy
recommendations.overview: A documentary about conspiracy theories takes a horrific turn after the filmmakers uncover an ancient and dangerous secret society.

recommendations.title: Killing Ground
recommendations.overview: A couple's camping trip turns into a frightening ordeal when they stumble across the scene of a horrific crime.

recommendations.title: Alice in Terrorland
recommendations.overview: A recently bereaved teenage girl goes to live with her aunt in a secluded woodland house, unaware that sinister forces lurk within.

recommendations.title: Dark Cloud
recommendations.overview: Following the aftermath of a horrific accident, a woman is voluntarily subjected to artificial intelligence for rehabilitation.

recommendations.title: Hold Your Breath
recommendations.overview: In 1930s Oklahoma amid the region's horrific dust storms, a woman is convinced that a sinister presence is threatening her family.
